Overview.title: Dashboard Overview
Overview.description: Welcome back! Here's what's happening with your website.

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.description: Latest updates and changes on your website
recentActivity.noActivityHint: Activity will appear here as you use your admin panel

systemStatus.title: System Status
systemStatus.description: Current system health and important notifications

header.title: Analytics
header.description: View website analytics and visitor statistics

toasts.selectDateRange: Please select both start and end dates

confirm.clearAll: Are you sure you want to delete ALL analytics data? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.clearRange: Are you sure you want to delete analytics data from {start} to {end}?

filters.dateRangeDescription: Filter analytics data by date range

websiteMetrics.title: Website Metrics
websiteMetrics.description: Control and manage your website analytics metrics data with options to filter by date range or permanently delete historical data.

clearSection.clearMetricsDescription: Permanently delete analytics metrics data. This action cannot be undone.

errors.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check your internet connection and try again.

editStatus.title: Edit Order Status
editStatus.description: This order is already {status}. Are you sure you want to modify the status of a {status} order?

create.taxIncluded: Tax is included in item prices

create.taxAdded: Tax amount will be added on top of the subtotal

payment.vatAddedText: VAT is added on top of item prices

dialog.description: Add or update catalog items and manage their details.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Item
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{item}"? This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the item from your catalog.

csv.dialogDescription: Select the data fields you want to include in your catalog CSV export

common.translationHint: Translation for {lang}. Leave empty to use default language.

toasts.discountPercentageMax: Discount percentage cannot be more than 100%
toasts.fixedDiscountInvalid: Fixed discount amount cannot be equal to or greater than the item price
toasts.metaTitleGenerated: Meta title generated and updated for all languages
toasts.metaDescriptionGenerated: Meta description generated and updated for all languages

basic.slugHelp: URL-friendly version of the name. Auto-generated from name but can be edited.

pricing.unitTypeHelp: This unit type will be applied to all pricing tiers
pricing.quantityBasedDescription: Set different prices for different quantities (wholesale discount)
pricing.tiersNote: The first tier is your base product price and quantity. Additional tiers are for bulk/wholesale pricing. Stock is shared across all pricing tiers - when customers buy different quantities, they get better pricing while using the same stock pool. Unit type is set globally above.

details.skuHelp: Stock Keeping Unit. Click the button to auto-generate.
details.durationDetermined: Duration will be determined based on requirements

placeholders.platform: e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams
placeholders.prerequisites: Any requirements or preparations needed before the service
placeholders.whatsIncluded: List what's included in this service (materials, tools, follow-up, etc.)
placeholders.additionalNotes: Additional service information, terms, or special instructions

images.uploadHelp: PNG, JPG, WEBP up to 10MB each

attributes.description: Select from predefined attributes from your store settings or add custom attributes to better describe your product.

seo.generateMetaTitlePlaceholder: Generate an SEO-optimized meta title for this product...
seo.generateMetaDescriptionPlaceholder: Generate an SEO-optimized meta description for this product...
seo.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Brief description for search results (150-160 characters) - {lang}
seo.productDescriptionPreview: Your product description will appear here in search results...

toasts.siteNameEmailRequired: Site name and email are required

site.title: Site Information
site.logoDescription: Upload your business logo or provide a URL. Recommended size: 200x200px, max 10MB.

seo.title: SEO & Meta Information
seo.description: Optimize your site for search engines and social sharing
seo.siteTitleDescription: The main title for your website, displayed in browser tabs and search results
seo.siteDescriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your website...
seo.siteDescriptionDescription: Brief description (150-160 characters) displayed in search results and social shares
seo.siteKeywordsDescription: Comma-separated list of keywords, up to 10 keywords.
seo.ogImageDescription: Image used when sharing on social media (recommended: 1200x630px, max 10MB)

location.title: Location & Service Area
location.currencyDescription: Default currency for pricing and transactions
location.defaultLanguageDescription: Default language for the frontend website

language.title: Language Settings
language.description: Configure frontend and backend language preferences
language.frontendLanguagesDescription: Select which frontend languages are available. You can add/remove languages and set a default.
language.backendLanguagesDescription: Select which backend languages are available. You can add/remove languages and set a default.

social.title: Social Networks
social.allDaysUsed: All days are already in use

email.title: Email Configuration
email.description: Configure email provider for sending transactional emails
email.emailProviderDescription: Choose your email service provider for sending emails
email.testEmailDescription: Send a test email to verify your email configuration is working correctly
email.smtpPortDescription: SMTP server port (typically 587 for TLS or 465 for SSL)
email.emailPassDescription: Your email account password or app-specific password

sms.title: SMS Configuration
sms.description: Configure SMS provider (Twilio) and enable SMS features
sms.twilioAccountSidDescription: Your Twilio Account SID from the Twilio Console
sms.twilioAuthTokenDescription: Your Twilio Auth Token from the Twilio Console
sms.twilioPhoneNumberDescription: Your Twilio phone number with country code (e.g., +15551234567)
sms.testSmsDescription: Send a test SMS to verify your Twilio configuration is working correctly. Include country code (e.g., +351912345678).

oauth.title: OAuth Providers
oauth.description: Configure social login providers for user authentication

web3.title: Web3 Integration
web3.description: Configure blockchain integration for Web3 features (NFTs, tokens, smart contracts)
web3.enableWeb3Description: Activate Web3 features for your application
web3.blockchainDescription: Select the blockchain network for Web3 features
web3.contractAddressDescription: Smart contract address for your token/NFT collection
web3.tokenSymbolDescription: Symbol for your token (e.g., ETH, BTC)
web3.chainSymbolDescription: Native currency symbol of the chain
web3.rpcUrlDescription: Custom RPC endpoint (Infura, Alchemy, etc.) - leave empty for default

security.title: Security & Access
security.baseUrlDescription: To override the URL, update your NEXTAUTH_URL environment variable
security.allowRegistrationDescription: Allow new users to create accounts
security.enableFrontendDescription: Allow access to the public-facing website

services.title: Third-Party Services
services.description: Configure integrations with external services (Google Analytics, Google Maps, etc.)

googleAnalytics.title: Google Analytics
googleAnalytics.enableAnalyticsDescription: Track website visitor analytics using Google Analytics
googleAnalytics.measurementIdDescription: Your Google Analytics Measurement ID (starts with G-)
googleAnalytics.howToGetId: How to get your Measurement ID:
googleAnalytics.step1: Go to Google Analytics Admin settings
googleAnalytics.step5: Copy the Measurement ID (starts with G-)

googleMaps.title: Google Maps Integration
googleMaps.description: Enable Google Maps and provide API key for Places/Maps services
googleMaps.enableMapsDescription: Enable Google Maps integration for location services

storage.title: File Storage
storage.description: Configure S3-compatible storage for file uploads (Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, DigitalOcean Spaces, etc.)
storage.enableS3Description: Use S3-compatible storage for file uploads instead of environment variables
storage.configNote: Storage credentials configured here will override environment variables. Leave fields empty to use environment variables instead.
storage.endpointDescription: S3-compatible endpoint URL (e.g., Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, DigitalOcean Spaces)
storage.secretKeyDescription: Your S3-compatible secret access key (keep this secure)
storage.bucketDescription: The name of your storage bucket
storage.publicUrlDescription: Custom domain for public file access (e.g., cdn.yourdomain.com)
